snippet: School councils may enter into contracts, agreements or arrangements for the supply of goods, services, facilities, materials, equipment and other matters that are required for the conduct of the school including the provision of pre-school programs. This will involve procuring, ordering, taking delivery, being invoiced and making payment. Comply with the policy for schools on Procurement – Schools . Comply with the policy for schools on Travel . Comply with the policy for schools on Gifts, Benefits and Hospitality . Comply with the policy for schools on Travel and Personal Expenses – Teaching Service .
